evals.prompt: Build a topical map for driftroast.com (single-origin coffee + brewing gear store) using its entity profile.
evals.expected_output: topical-map.json validating against schema: pillars/clusters/supporting, core/outer split, every node has intent + query_network, no sibling pair above cannibalization threshold, priority order + calendar.

assertions.text: every node has intent with provenance
assertions.name: intent_prov

assertions.text: every outer node has a link path into core
assertions.name: outer_to_core

assertions.text: no search volume is invented at T0 (volume null or measured)
assertions.name: no_fake_volume

evals.prompt: What should we write about to build topical authority for an AP automation SaaS? Give me the content architecture.
evals.expected_output: A pillar-cluster-supporting map, not a flat keyword list; core section maps to evaluation/adoption intent.

assertions.text: output is tiered (pillar/cluster/supporting), not a flat list
assertions.name: tiered
